{{Infobox location
| name = Erin
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Erin Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Erin is a small continent that was historically situated between the territories of [[Othaghor]] and [[Tharlos]], serving as a site for perpetual conflict between chaos and [[life]]. The land is characterized by its [[Erinin plains]], which contain massive stone [[obelisks]] excavated by slaves. The continent features various locations, including the port town of Kalvin's Rest in its northern region. While some political discussions involve movements for Erin to achieve independence or secession from the [[Empire]], others suggest a vision where different regions, such as the [[Erinin]], govern themselves. The continent's architecture includes structures made from quarried stone.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Erin]] is a place [[Naberius]]'s father came from.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|There are people in [[Erin]] talking of secession.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Erin]] is a location where [[Crawlers]] nest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] might have had ancestors from [[Erin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Erinin]] rule over [[Erin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Erin]] is a location where tides can lead.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Erin]] is a location with ice fields to its south.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Erin]] is a region containing the port town of [[Kalvin’s Rest]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Erin]] is a location containing [[Consultant]] chapter houses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Looking at the tides, I thought it would come out somewhere in Erin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
